crates.description: A Rust crate (library or binary) published to the registry.

name.description: The canonical name of the crate.

description.description: A short description of the crate.

homepage.description: The homepage URL for the crate.

repository.description: The source repository URL for the crate.

documentation.description: The documentation URL for the crate.

categories.description: Category slugs that the crate belongs to.

downloads.description: Total all-time download count for the crate.

recent_downloads.description: Recent (last 90 days) download count for the crate.

max_version.description: The highest semver version published for this crate.

max_stable_version.description: The highest stable (non-pre-release) version published for this crate.

newest_version.description: The most recently published version of this crate.

yanked.description: Whether the latest version of the crate has been yanked.

license.description: The SPDX license identifier(s) for the crate.

links.description: Hypermedia links for related crates.io resources.
